title: Tightfault Revamp Edit
description: A small edit for the pack "Tightfault" for later versions of the game
body:
# Tightfault for later versions!
An edit I made for Tightfault Revamp for 1.21 (Old versions will NEVER be updated)

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/tightfault-revamp-edit?color=blue&style=flat-square)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-orange?style=flat-square)
![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/nfw2Qplb?color=red&style=flat-square)
![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/nfw2Qplb?color=purple&style=flat-square)

## I need your help...
[Vote for texture changes!](https://forms.gle/fAAZBxid5Cev1kNi7)

[Github](https://github.com/karmette/Tightfault-Revamp-Edit): Open an issue to help, thanks!

### Features
- Netherite tools and GUI edited to follow the Tightfault "style"
- Highlighted Ores and Ancient Debris with connected textures (See [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) for this feature)

### Suggestions
[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/fNtaBGQGFV)
Open a ticket and leave a suggestion or bug report. Thanks!



### Credits:
#### Tight (Original Creator)
[![Video to Tightfault Revamp](https://img.youtube.com/vi/fRDaP1aAPug/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=fRDaP1aAPug)
#### Juskebat (Made recipe book texture)
#### Vanilla Tweaks (I included some tweaks in the pack)
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

Check out Technofault, its pretty cool as well.
